chapters.title: 1. Closures
chapters.content: Jab ek function apne bahar wale function ke variables ko yaad rakhta hai.

chapters.title: 2. Prototypal Inheritance
chapters.content: JavaScript me har object ka ek parent (prototype) hota hai jisse wo properties leta hai.

chapters.title: 3. The 'this' Keyword
chapters.content: Ye batata hai ki function kis context me chal raha hai (kaun use call kar raha hai).
